closed_debts.title: Ambiguedad entre runtime raiz y runtime por proyecto
evidence: StateStore.for_project_runtime(project_root) and StateStore.for_repo_runtime(repo_root) make runtime selection intentional.
TaskQueue and recovery persistence now require an explicit StateStore.
build_directive_context and generate_current_directive require explicit runtime_dir.
AgentRuntime no longer falls back silently to repo_root/runtime for control-plane sessions.

closed_debts.title: Doble ruta de worker
evidence: orchestrator/executor.py delegates worker process launch through TaskWorkerAdapter.
backend/agent_worker_adapters.py defines SessionWorkerAdapter, ControlPlaneSessionWorkerAdapter and LegacyPtySessionWorkerAdapter.
backend/agent_runtime.py selects the session worker through select_session_worker_adapter.
The legacy PTY path still exists for compatibility but is now a named adapter path.

commands.command: python3 -m py_compile orchestrator/state_store.py orchestrator/task_queue.py orchestrator/recovery.py orchestrator/directive_context.py orchestrator/directive_generator.py orchestrator/worker_adapter.py orchestrator/executor.py backend/agent_worker_adapters.py backend/agent_runtime.py backend/test_runtime_boundary.py
python3 -m unittest backend.test_control_plane_visual_bridge backend.test_tool_invocation_policy backend.test_executor_pipe_drain backend.test_runtime_boundary
env PYTHONPATH=backend:. python3 -m unittest backend.test_agent_runtime_habla backend.test_human_alignment_review backend.test_project_state_runtime_metadata

commands.notes: No productive StateStore() or DEFAULT_STORE remains; remaining root/runtime hits are explicit constructors, tests, benchmark output folders or project-local defaults.
Worker routes are visible through TaskWorkerAdapter and SessionWorkerAdapter implementations.

notes: Git status/diff could not be used because the working directory is not a git repository.
Legacy PTY remains for compatibility, but it is now exposed as LegacyPtySessionWorkerAdapter rather than an unlabelled alternate route.
